questions.prompt: What is ecology the study of?
options: The interactions between organisms and their environment

questions.prompt: What term describes all the living organisms in a particular area?
What is the role of producers in an ecosystem?
options: They produce their own food using sunlight

questions.prompt: Which organisms break down dead organic matter and recycle nutrients?
What is a food chain?
options: A series of organisms linked by energy transfer through eating
A group of animals living together
A collection of plants in a forest

questions.prompt: Which biome is characterized by very low rainfall and sparse vegetation?
What term describes a group of individuals of the same species living in a specific area?
What is biodiversity?
options: The number of ecosystems on Earth
The variety of life in a particular habitat or on Earth
The number of animals in a forest
The amount of water in an ecosystem

questions.prompt: Which process do plants use to convert sunlight into energy?
What term describes an organism that eats plants?
Which gas is removed from the atmosphere during photosynthesis?
What is an ecosystem?
options: A group of animals living together
A community of organisms and their physical environment
Only the plants in an area
A collection of mountains and rivers

questions.prompt: What type of consumer eats both plants and animals?
Which biome contains dense forests, high rainfall, and high biodiversity?
What is the primary source of energy for most ecosystems on Earth?
What term describes a species that has a disproportionately large impact on its ecosystem?
What is the role of a predator in an ecosystem?
What term describes the gradual change in species composition in an ecosystem over time?
Which layer of the ocean receives the most sunlight and supports most marine life?
What term describes non-living components of an ecosystem such as water, sunlight, and temperature?
